architecture.summary: Internal sync subsystem fix. Four independent trigger paths, in-memory lock (Map), cross-process race conditions. Fix: file-based LockManager, shared throttle utility. No architectural changes to overall system.

integrations.summary: GitHub API only (gh CLI). Existing integration, no new services. Fix reduces API calls via body diff checks and throttling.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - backend sync subsystem only, no UI involved.

performance.summary: Reduces GitHub API spam (19 identical comments, 34 duplicate issues). Throttle deduplicates trigger paths. Body diff prevents no-op edits.

security.summary: N/A - no auth changes, no new credentials. Uses existing gh CLI auth. File lock permissions follow existing LockManager patterns.

edge-cases.summary: TOCTOU race in duplicate-detector Phase 3 (disabled by default). Cross-process sync via in-memory Map. Four concurrent trigger paths with no coordination. All addressed by planned fixes.
